logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : START
logger.message:
#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "START", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: Mule::p("mule.env"), timestamp: now(), correlationId: correlationId, transmissionId: payload[0].b2bMessage.header.transmissionId default uuid(), //payloadSizeBytes: sizeOf(write(payload, "application/json")), "Message" : "Initiating request to endpoint: " ++ vars.httpOperation.basePath ++ vars.httpOperation.path
}]

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : END
